qfd_structural_checklist.item: Front porch: 6-8 performance criteria (customer attributes) populated
Every PC has a direction-of-change symbol (↑ ↓ target)
Main floor relationships on -2..+2 (or 0/1/3/9) scale, blanks = 0
qfd_structural_checklist.detail: -2..+2 scale used. 35 of 108 cells nonzero (32.4% density; 67.6% sparsity)

qfd_structural_checklist.item: Every PC row has ≥ 1 non-zero relationship
Every EC column has ≥ 1 non-zero relationship OR is flagged with rationale
qfd_structural_checklist.detail: EC18 has zero relationships; flagged as compliance hygiene anchor (not a QFD optimization knob). See validation.every_ec_has_nonzero_pc_or_flagged in c1v_QFD.json.

qfd_structural_checklist.item: Roof uses lower triangle only (pair EC_i↔EC_j stored with i<j)
Back porch: ≥ 2 named competitors scored 1-5 against own system
qfd_structural_checklist.detail: Competitor B = Devin (Cognition), Competitor C = Cursor (Anysphere); scored 1-5 on every PC with rationale

qfd_structural_checklist.item: Basement: every EC has target, technical difficulty, estimated cost
qfd_structural_checklist.detail: 18 ECs have target + difficulty (1-5) + cost (1-5). Competitor values populated where applicable; N/A with justification elsewhere.

qfd_structural_checklist.item: No writes to formula cells (imputed importance rows)
qfd_structural_checklist.detail: Excel SUMPRODUCT formulas on rows 50-52 were left intact; actuals read back from saved xlsx and copied into c1v_QFD.json → _basement_imputed_importance_actual.

qfd_structural_checklist.item: Metadata fields populated or blank (never invented)
qfd_structural_checklist.detail: project_title, developed_by, last_updated filled from David's approvals

course_checklist_qfd.detail: Inherited from M4 (1-5 raw ratings, normalized to sum=1)
18 ECs derived from M4's 8 candidates plus M3 FFBD activity measurements and M2 constants_table

↑ (larger better) = 4 ECs (EC4, EC6, EC7, EC10); ↓ (smaller better) = 11 ECs (EC1, EC2, EC3, EC8, EC11, EC12, EC13, EC14, EC15, EC16, EC17); target = 3 ECs (EC5 routing granularity, EC9 cache TTL, EC18 retention)
Devin + Cursor scored on all 6 PCs with written rationale
18 targets set; 13 promoted to Final constants (see constants_touched_by_m5)
Excel SUMPRODUCT formulas computed on save. Top 5 EC by |marks|·wt: EC8 (1.00), EC7 (0.96), EC1 (0.80), EC10 (0.76), EC6 (0.64). Source of truth: c1v_QFD.json → _basement_imputed_importance_actual.
4 negative pairs flagged: EC1↔EC2, EC2↔EC4, EC5↔EC6, EC9↔EC11
All 5 Q1..Q5 from qfd_handoff.json resolved in open_questions_resolved
interfaces_handoff.json produced. 14 candidate subsystems (SS1..SS14) + 8 top-imputed-importance interfaces with SLAs; 4 roof tradeoffs escalated as coordination constraints.

main_floor_stats.notes: Sparsity >50% is expected for a well-formed HoQ — each PC should connect to only a few ECs.

imputed_importance_ranking.ec: EC8 Context tokens per agent call

_imputed_importance_source_of_truth: c1v_QFD.json → _basement_imputed_importance_actual (computed by Excel SUMPRODUCT on save; preview numbers superseded).

rejection_check_summary.pc_1_max_2pct_default_mode: PASS — EC1/EC3/EC4 targets keep customer-side overhead well below 2% ceiling (6 probes/min × 4 KB payload).
rejection_check_summary.pc_3_min_100pct_traceback: PASS — EC10 target = 100% (Final). EC9 TTL = 24h; EC11 doc refresh = 7d; EC8 token budget = 8000 ensures full citation context fits.
rejection_check_summary.net: No PCs violate M1/M4 hard constraints.

known_limitations: EC18 (Audit log retention) has zero nonzero cells in main floor. Retained as compliance hygiene anchor per M4 D3 (compliance deferred to v2). Not a QFD optimization knob in v1.
Competitor basement values for Devin and Cursor are industry-informed estimates (marked 'Est.') where no public benchmark exists. Rescore in v1.1+ if published benchmarks emerge.
EC5 (LLM routing granularity) target = 2 (per-session) is a product-strategy pin, not a measured optimum. Revisit if per-request routing delivers measurable founder-intake wins.

Spec generation budget stayed at 300s (PC.4 target); 150s A(high) stretch depends on EC6=5 parallel dispatch × EC7=70% cache hit rate. Actual v1 performance will validate or force a re-tune in Module 6 interfaces.
Credential rotation at 90d (EC17) is operational-only. Tighten to 30d when compliance evidence export comes online in v2.

new_questions_for_module_6: How does the EC1↔EC2 roof tradeoff manifest in the probe-SDK ↔ aggregator interface contract?
How does the EC9↔EC11 coordination (traceback cache vs. vendor-doc refresh) express as an invalidation protocol?
Does the EC5↔EC6 coupling (routing policy vs. parallel dispatch) require a shared session token schema?
Does the spec generator need to emit citation-completeness telemetry (EC10 monitoring) as a formal interface to the traceback store?

overall_status: PASS — QFD House of Quality v1.0 complete; Module 6 handoff ready
